subject: An exclusive system for DePasquale The Spa
body:
DePasquale The Spa's massive 26,000 sq ft facility in Morris Plains signals a capacity for the systematic approach MaRe enables. MaRe Eye, our trichologist-developed scalp diagnostic, elevates retail conversion from the industry-standard 3% to 40%+ by grounding every Philip Martin's recommendation in clinical data. We partner exclusively with venues that match our standard for luxury and head health — I'd like to explore whether that includes yours.
— Rebecca
